ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Frank Patterson (Trustee).

Ms. Jagiello stated that the $4,800.00 fee for the accounting was due to the accounting having to be re-done, to the complexity of the issues and the time it took to do the accounting, and suggested that $1,500.00 to $2,000.00 be paid by Frank and the remainder be paid by the Trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Third Account
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Third Account
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Frank Patterson.

Ms. Jagiello stated that she hoped to have the accounting filed tomorrow, that she had to do a couple of entries and that she was also doing a status report on the Conservatorship matter. In addition, she stated that the Mercedes Benz had already been sold. Status on filing of the Third Account was set for January 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Third Account is to be filed by January 11, 2010. The Court directed Ms. Jagiello to address the issue regarding the sale of the automobile in the Third Account in the event that she could not do a supplemental Inventory and Appraisal. The Order to Show Cause is vacated.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney for failure to file the Third Account. The return date is December 14, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
